news.headline: Japan's top 3% see their assets rise to a historic $3 trillion.
Korea Zinc strengthens position as top indium producer amid rising Chinese export controls, boosting U.S.-Korea economic security.
news.summary: In Seoul, South Korea, as of February 14, 2025, Korea Zinc (KRX:010130) is strengthening its prominent role in the worldwide critical minerals supply chain amid China's tightened export regulations. This move comes as a response to the recent expansion of export controls by China. Korea Zinc stands out as the sole domestic supplier of three essential minerals in the global market.

news.headline: Appier predicts strong FY25 growth, plans acquisition of AdCreative.ai to boost margins and market reach. FY24 revenue hit record JPY 34.1 billion.
news.summary: An acquisition deal has been reached for AdCreative.ai, aiming to boost gross margins, strengthen product synergies, and broaden the total addressable market. Noteworthy accomplishments in fiscal year 2024 include sustained growth in key focus areas resulting in a record revenue peak of JPY 34.1 billion.

news.headline: Casino Group sells ownership stake in Infinity Advertising, restructuring its ownership.
news.summary: The government has announced that the unemployment rate has decreased to 4.2%, the lowest in the past decade. The economy has added 250,000 new jobs in the last quarter, surpassing expectations. The stock market has reached record highs, with the main index increasing by 15% in the last six months. Additionally, inflation remains stable at 2.5%. Experts predict continued growth in the coming months, with projections indicating a GDP growth of 3.8% for the next year.

news.headline: Casino Group: Infinity Advertising - Shareholder evolution discussed.
Sompo Holdings forms two global segments: Sompo P&C and Sompo Wellbeing, effective April 1, 2025. Resilient and innovative structure.
news.summary: On February 14, 2025, Sompo Holdings Inc. revealed a significant business reorganization plan, dividing its operations into two key global segments: Sompo Property and Casualty (re)insurance (Sompo P&C) and Sompo Wellbeing. This restructuring, set to take effect on April 1, 2025, aims to streamline their organizational structure and enhance efficiency. Sompo Holdings, an integrated financial group dedicated to offering health, wellbeing, and financial protection services, anticipates that this new setup will result in a more resilient, innovative, and sustainable platform that benefits all parties involved.

news.headline: Swiss PPI MoM Actual 0.1% (Forecast -, Previous 0.0%)
Swiss PPI YoY Actual -0.3% (Forecast -, Previous -0.9%)

Wall Street forecasters adjust Portland General Electric to expect 35 cents/share in Q4, lower than last year's 67 cents. Quarterly revenue projected at $663.32M, down from $725M last year. Stock closed at $42.12, dividend declared 50 cents/share.
news.summary: Portland General Electric Company (NYSE:POR) is set to unveil its Q4 financial results on Friday, Feb. 14, 2025. Analysts anticipate earnings of 35 cents per share, a decrease from 67 cents per share reported a year ago. Revenue for the quarter is projected to be $663.32 million, down from $725 million in the same period last year. The company's board of directors announced a quarterly common stock dividend of 50 cents per share on Feb. 12. Shares of Portland General Electric closed at $42.12, up by 0.7% on Thursday. For more details, readers can find the complete article on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: JETOUR introduces T1 series: lite off-road car blending sportiness, toughness. Awarded 2024 Red Dot Design Award.
news.summary: In WUHU, China on February 14, 2025, the JETOUR brand introduced the T1 series, a stylish off-road vehicle combining sporty and rugged elements. The T1 received the esteemed 2024 Red Dot Design Concept Award, highlighting its innovative design. This recognition solidifies the JETOUR T1's position in the market.

news.headline: Power tools market in Europe to grow by USD 2.14 billion from 2025-2029, driven by popularity of cordless tools; AI report by Technavio.
news.summary: In New York on February 14, 2025, a recent report highlights the transformative impact of AI on the market landscape. Specifically, the Power tools market in Europe is projected to increase by approximately USD 2.14 billion between 2025 and 2029, with a forecasted compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 3.6%. This data comes from Technavio's analysis of the market trends and suggests significant growth opportunities in the sector due to advancements in artificial intelligence.

news.headline: GN introduces share-based incentive program per approved Remuneration Policy, with long-term program from 2025 focusing on Performance Share Units (PSUs) for management & key employees. Board granted first plan in alignment with shareholder interests post AGM on March 13, 2024.
news.summary: On March 13, 2024, GN's Remuneration Policy was approved at the annual general meeting. The policy states that the long-term incentive program starting from 2025 will rely on performance share units (PSUs) to enhance performance, retention, and alignment with shareholders' interests. The GN Board of Directors recently approved the details of the new PSU plan and awarded the first grant accordingly.

news.headline: Moderna to report Q4 loss of $2.68/share, revenue projected at $942.84 million, shares rose by 4.5% to $31.92.
news.summary: Moderna, Inc. (NASDAQ: MRNA) is set to announce its Q4 financial results on Feb. 14, 2025, before the market opens. Analysts predict a loss of $2.68 per share, contrasting with earnings of $0.55 per share a year ago. Expected quarterly revenue is $942.84 million, down from $2.81 billion in the previous year. Moderna has surpassed consensus estimates for both revenue and earnings in the last four quarters. Closing at $31.92 on Thursday, Moderna shares rose by 4.5%. For further details, visit the Analyst Stock Ratings page on Benzinga.

news.headline: Implantica reports progress in FDA approval process for RefluxStop™ in Q4 2024; submitted clinical portion in Module 2.
news.summary: In Vaduz, Liechtenstein, on February 14, 2025, RefluxStop™ achieved a significant milestone by submitting the extensive clinical Module 2 as part of the Premarket Approval (PMA) application to the U.S. Food and Drug Administration (FDA). This module, which is a crucial component of the three-part process, included vital clinical data. This development marks a notable advancement in the FDA approval process for RefluxStop™.

news.headline: Bekaert provides update on its Share Buyback Program and Liquidity Agreement with investors.
Scholz targets undecided voters before election, emphasizes winning strategy.
Zinzino AB acquires Zurvita's assets post DIP financing, completing the deal announced Dec. 21, 2024. #Sweden
news.summary: In Gothenburg, Sweden, on February 14, 2025, a recent press release disclosed that Zinzino has successfully completed a deal to purchase the assets of Zurvita, a healthcare company operating in direct sales. This agreement came after Zinzino acted as a debtor-in-possession (DIP) financier for Zurvita. The announcement was made on December 21, 2024.

news.headline: Syngenta Group appoints Alf Barrios as independent director and committee member, bringing 35 years of global experience.
news.summary: In Basel, Switzerland, the Syngenta Group disclosed the appointment of Alf Barrios, a dual Spanish and U.S. national, as an independent director post a General Shareholders’ Meeting on February 14, 2025. The Company stated that his election to the Board was unanimous, marking the commencement of his duties from the same date. Alf Barrios concurrently assumes roles in both the Compensation Committee and Audit Committee. With an extensive background surpassing 35 years, he has operated across various regions focusing on natural resources and energy sectors.

news.headline: Hermes' Dumas: Hermes will hike product prices if US tariffs are applied.
Norsk Hydro's 2024 Annual Report to be in European Single Electronic Format (ESEF).
Caledonia Mining Corp. appoints Stefan Buys & Lesley Goldwasser as non-executive directors, effective Feb. 14, 2025.
news.summary: Jersey-based Caledonia Mining Corporation Plc (NYSE American, AIM, and VFEX: CMCL) has appointed Stefan Buys and Lesley Goldwasser as independent non-executive directors to its board. The appointments are effective immediately as of February 14, 2025.

news.headline: Announcing Innofactor's financial report for 2024.
Wereldhave completes placement of 2,206,838 shares after asset contribution from Nextensa N.V. on Feb 13, 2025.
news.summary: Wereldhave N.V. has successfully issued 2,206,838 new shares after market on Thursday, February 13, 2025. This issuance follows the contribution of an asset linked to Knauf Shopping Center Schmiede (Luxembourg) to Wereldhave by Nextensa N.V.

news.headline: Equinor ASA allotted shares to insiders under share savings plan (OSE: EQNR, NYSE: EQNR).
news.summary: Equinor (OSE: EQNR, NYSE: EQNR) has assigned shares to specific primary insiders and their close associates within the company's share savings plan. This allocation pertains to a specific number of shares and is a part of Equinor's ongoing efforts to encourage employee share ownership.

news.headline: BTS Group AB to hold Q4 2024 presentation and call on Feb 26, 08.00 am CET with CEO Jessica Skon.
news.summary: Stockholm, Sweden - On February 14, 2024, BTS Group AB (publ), a prominent global strategy implementation company, announced its upcoming interim report presentation and conference call with CEO Jessica Skon. The event is scheduled for Wednesday, February 26 at 08:00 am CET and is open to investors, analysts, and business media. Stay tuned for insights into the company's performance and future strategies.

Major bank to cut more investment bank jobs next week.
Nxera Pharma Co., Ltd. proposes changes to its Board of Directors with nominations for External Directors. Vote scheduled for March 26.
news.summary: On February 14, 2025, Nxera Pharma Co., Ltd. in Tokyo, Japan and Cambridge, UK, disclosed a significant update. The company, listed on TSE 4565, revealed that its Board of Directors has sanctioned alterations in its directorial body. The selection of External Directors was predicated on the decision of the Nomination Committee. These appointments are anticipated to receive formal approval, pending the adoption of resolutions during the 35th Ordinary General Meeting of Shareholders. The meeting is set to convene on March 26, 2025.

news.headline: Huhtamaki to split Fiber Foodservice into Fiber Packaging and Foodservice Europe-Asia-Oceania by April 1, 2025.
news.summary: On February 14, 2025, at 08:35 EEST, Huhtamaki Oyj announced its decision to divide the Fiber Foodservice Europe-Asia-Oceania business segment into two separate segments: Fiber Packaging and Foodservice Europe-Asia-Oceania. This restructuring is scheduled to be implemented no later than April 1, 2025. The company aims to streamline operations and enhance focus within these specific areas.

news.headline: Sara Engber, 56, appointed President of Fiber Packaging at Huhtamaki, to report to CEO Ralf K. Wunderlich.
news.summary: On February 14, 2025, Huhtamäki Oyj announced Sara Engber, aged 56, as the new President of Fiber Packaging and a member of the Global Executive Team. She will be reporting directly to the President and CEO, Ralf K. Wunderlich. Engber will be stationed in Espoo, Finland, taking on this crucial role within the company.

news.headline: Vow ASA secures EUR 10.9 million order for new cruise ship with potential for two more, deliveries in late 2025 and 2026.
news.summary: A significant European shipyard has recently awarded Vow ASA (stock symbol OSE: VOW) and its subsidiary Scanship a purchase order valued at EUR 10.9 million. The deliveries are scheduled to commence in late 2025 and continue into 2026.

news.headline: India plans to increase imports of oil and LNG from the US to evade tariffs, citing economic benefits.
Aker ASA's NAV reaches NOK 58.2 billion; proposes NOK 26.50 per share cash dividend in Q4 2024.
news.summary: In Oslo, Norway, as of February 14, 2025, the Net Asset Value ("NAV") of Aker ASA and its holding companies stood at NOK 58.2 billion by the conclusion of the fourth quarter of 2024 following dividend distributions. This marked an increase from NOK 57.0 billion recorded at the close of the third quarter. Aker also distributed a dividend...

news.headline: 2024 Umicore full year financial results released, showing increase in revenue and profit.
Nxera Pharma updates operations & reports Q4 results; Full year results ended Dec 31, 2024, available.
news.summary: On February 14, 2025, Nxera Pharma Co., Ltd., based in Tokyo, Japan and Cambridge, UK, announced updates on its operational activities and released its consolidated financial results for the fourth quarter and full 12 months ending on December 31, 2024. The Company, listed as TSE 4565, shared this information in a recent report, accessible for viewing.

news.headline: Novaturas Group earns EUR 9.1 mln in January, down by 15% compared to previous year, serving 9k customers.
news.summary: Preliminary data reveals that in January, Novaturas Group recorded revenues of EUR 9.1 million, indicating a 15% decline from January 2024, where earnings were EUR 10.7 million. The company catered to 9,000 customers, compared to 9,700 during the corresponding period in the previous year.

news.headline: Diös Fastigheter's Year-end Report 2024 shows focus on transactions - divested non-core properties in first 6 months, then concentrated on growth.
news.summary: In Östersund, Sweden, on February 14, 2025, it was reported that a remarkable year of financial activity had concluded. Over the course of twelve months, a strategic approach was taken, with the initial six months dedicated to enhancing the balance sheet through the sale of non-essential assets. This phase was followed by a strong emphasis on expansion and development in the latter half of the year, resulting in substantial growth in key areas.

news.headline: Huhtamäki Oyj had a solid year with improved market conditions; financial statement release on 14.2.2025 at 8:30.
news.summary: Financial results for Huhtamäki Oyj for the period of January 1 to December 31, 2024, have been released on February 14, 2025, at 8:30 AM. The company has reported a solid performance during the year in a market that showed gradual improvement. The specific numbers detailing the financial performance of Huhtamäki Oyj for the mentioned period have been disclosed.

news.headline: KPN and ABP establish new Tower Company "Althio" after approval from Dutch Authority for Consumers & Markets on Feb 6, 2025. Operations begin today.
news.summary: Royal KPN N.V. (KPN) and ABP have completed the transaction to establish a new Tower Company, named Althio. The agreement was signed on 5 June 2024, and received approval from the Dutch Authority for Consumers & Markets on 6 February 2025. Althio (www.althio.nl) is now officially operational as of today.

news.headline: Coinbase CEO Brian Armstrong plans to add DEXes to handle meme coin surge in rising 1M weekly tokens, compares to early web.
news.summary: Coinbase Global Inc.'s CEO, Brian Armstrong, recently emphasized the need to reexamine the token listing process amidst a growing trend of meme coin launches. In the fourth-quarter 2024 earnings call, Armstrong noted the rapid evolution of the cryptocurrency sector, witnessing approximately 1 million new tokens introduced weekly. He expressed concerns about the majority of these tokens being of "lower quality" and classified as meme coins. Armstrong likened the current scenario to the early days of the Internet when all major websites could fit into a single directory, suggesting the need for improved sorting mechanisms akin to Google Search.

news.headline: China’s President Xi to chair symposium attended by Alibaba's Ma. $BABA
Bioretec Ltd's financial statements for 2024 show foundation for future growth. CE mark received in Jan 2025.
news.summary: TAMPERE, Finland  - On February 14, 2025, Bioretec Ltd made a company announcement at 8:00 a.m. detailing their financial performance for January to December 2024. The full financial statements bulletin, including tables, was released providing a comprehensive overview of the company's results during the stated period.

news.headline: Berkshire Hathaway sold $36 million of DaVita shares, now holding 35.892 million shares with 45% stake. DaVita's Q4 revenue beats estimates at $3.3 billion.
news.summary: Berkshire Hathaway Inc. (NYSE:BRK) has reduced its stake in DaVita Inc. (NYSE:DVA) by selling 203,091 shares, valued at $35.96 million based on the closing price. Berkshire now holds approximately 35.892 million shares, representing a 45% stake post share repurchase. The company has held DaVita since Q4 of 2011. DaVita reported full-year revenue of $12.8 billion and Q4 revenue of $3.3 billion, surpassing estimates. Earnings per share were $3.09 for the quarter and $10.73 for the year. This information was disclosed in a U.S. Securities Exchange Commission filing and the full story can be found on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Court approves 60-day halt in Binance vs. SEC case, prompting Ripple and Coinbase to review legal matters amid SEC changes.
news.summary: Other major players in the cryptocurrency industry, such as Ripple and Coinbase, could be compelled to review their legal battles with the Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) in light of the 60-day suspension. This move may signify a shift in the approach taken by key companies in the sector regarding regulatory matters.

Global electricity demand expected to rise significantly, according to IEA report.
